prompt: The turn shift pairs the board and weakens your clean improvement path. Choose the best action.
why_v1: Paired turn shifts can reduce clean improvement and make disciplined folds better than forcing thin continues.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The paired turn shift points to a fold.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Begin with the paired turn shift: once the board pairs and your clean improvement path shrinks, the disciplined action is to fold rather than continue thinly.
